_schema_notes: Rules MAY include an optional 'feature_id' field when the rule was added for a specific groomed feature.
feature_id links back to features/<feature_id>/ — the living requirements document for that feature.
Rules without feature_id are baseline regression/ACL expectations.
When a QA audit finds a violation on a rule with feature_id, Dev must IMPLEMENT the feature (not just fix a regression).

rules.notes: Destructive or side-effect routes — skip entirely. GET requests here may trigger state changes or require test data that doesn't exist. Includes 'save' (form-submission-only endpoints; GET probes always timeout/fail). Assume ACL mirrors non-destructive routes on the same resource. First-match so no other rule fires.
User account cancellation route — skip entirely. Would cancel the QA test user account.

Campaign/character list pages — 'access dungeoncrawler characters' is required. Release-c commit b4bf6d998 granted this to authenticated (and content_editor inherits it). All roles with this permission or is_admin=true get allow; anon (no permission) gets deny.

Creation flows — no entity ID needed, always routable. /campaigns/create requires 'access dungeoncrawler characters'; /characters/create requires 'create dungeoncrawler characters'. Both granted to authenticated via user.role.authenticated.yml (release-c commit b4bf6d998). authenticated and content_editor both get allow (content_editor inherits authenticated permissions).

Non-entity-ID sub-paths for campaigns/characters. /campaigns/archived requires 'access dungeoncrawler characters' (commit b4cc4e683). authenticated has this permission (release-c commit b4bf6d998); content_editor inherits from authenticated. anon=deny (no permission).
Entity-ID sub-routes (/campaigns/{id}/..., /characters/{id}/...) — ignore: route probes use placeholder IDs that may not exist in test DB; ACL is correct when data exists

CEO decision 2026-02-28: dungeoncrawler_tester is a dev-only module not enabled in production. The settings route returns 404 in production (module not installed) which is correct behavior. Suppress this route from production audit failures.
Drupal admin backend — only administrator and dc_playwright_admin have full access; content_editor omitted (partial access, needs finer-grained rules)
Static public pages with _access: TRUE — no permission required, all roles allow. Routes: /home, /world, /how-to-play, /about, /credits, /hexmap.
Architecture documentation pages — require 'access content' (granted to both anonymous and authenticated roles). All roles allow.
Dungeoncrawler testing dashboard and sub-routes (GET-accessible) — require 'administer site configuration'. administrator and dc_playwright_admin allow; all others deny.
Dungeoncrawler objects list — requires 'administer dungeoncrawler content'. administrator and dc_playwright_admin allow (is_admin or equivalent); all others deny.

LangGraph console routes under /admin/reports/copilot-agent-tracker/langgraph-console/*. Require 'administer copilot agent tracker'. Covered by admin-area allow for administrator/dc_playwright_admin. Explicit rule for copilot_agent_tracker routes added to prevent recurrence of 20260319-125409 violation pattern. dc_playwright_admin was granted this permission in forseti.life commit 175b7c3b4.

Ancestry traits catalog GET endpoint. Requires 'access dungeoncrawler characters'. This permission is on the authenticated role, so ALL authenticated users (including content_editor) inherit it. Added 2026-03-22 preflight for release 20260322-dungeoncrawler-release (ancestry-traits dev item).

Inventory management API endpoints (/api/inventory/{owner_type}/{owner_id}/...). All require 'access dungeoncrawler characters' (authenticated roles have it) or _csrf_request_header_mode (POST-only). Parameterized paths don't surface in route scans; set all roles to ignore. POST routes (add, sell, transfer, location, character_inventory) are inaccessible via GET probe regardless of permission. Added 2026-03-22 preflight for release 20260322-dungeoncrawler-release-next (clan-dagger dev item 5bc95ffe4). Dev explicitly requested qa-permissions.json registration for inventory_sell_item route.

Entity-ID API routes for characters (/api/character/{id}/...). Use custom _character_access check (entity ownership + existence). Probe IDs may not exist in test DB, so 404 is expected even for authorized roles. Set all roles to ignore (similar to auth-required-entity). Covers traits and level-up API endpoints added in 20260320 dev cycle.
GET /ancestries — list all ancestry nodes. _access: TRUE (no Drupal permission required). All roles allow. Added preflight 20260327-dungeoncrawler-release-b (dc-cr-ancestry-system).

GET /ancestries/{id} — single ancestry detail, slug-based parameterized path (e.g. /ancestries/human). _access: TRUE but probe IDs may not match seeded slugs. Ignore all roles (parameterized; 404 for non-existent slug is not a permission violation). Added preflight 20260327-dungeoncrawler-release-b (dc-cr-ancestry-system).

POST /api/combat/action — _permission: 'access dungeoncrawler characters' + _csrf_request_header_mode: TRUE. POST-only; GET probe returns 405 (not a permission violation). Ignore all roles. Added preflight 20260328-dungeoncrawler-release-b (dc-cr-action-economy).
POST /dice/roll — _access: TRUE, POST-only. GET probe returns 405 (not a permission issue). Ignore all roles. Added preflight 20260327-dungeoncrawler-release-b (dc-cr-dice-system).
POST /rules/check — _access: TRUE, POST-only. GET probe returns 405 (not a permission issue). Ignore all roles. Added preflight 20260327-dungeoncrawler-release-b (dc-cr-difficulty-class).

AI conversation API routes — require 'use ai conversation' permission. anon/authenticated/content_editor denied (no permission). administrator/dc_playwright_player/dc_playwright_admin have permission but GET probing is not representative: /ai-conversation/send-message is POST-only (GET returns 403/405 regardless of permissions); /ai-conversation/stats requires a node_id param (GET returns 400 — permission passes but missing param). Set admin/player/admin to 'ignore' — permission was verified by dev directly (forseti.life commit d5ae178fa; GET /ai-conversation/stats with dc_playwright_player returns 400 confirming permission passes).

GET /node/{node}/chat — requires 'use ai conversation' permission AND node.view entity access. Parameterized (needs valid node ID): probes return 403 for anon/authenticated/content_editor (no permission). administrator has permission but route is parameterized; probe results depend on node ID availability. Set all roles to ignore — parameterized route, not meaningfully auditable without seeded node IDs. Added preflight 20260406-dungeoncrawler-release-b.

GET /node/{node}/trigger-summary — requires 'use ai conversation' permission AND node.view entity access. Same access model as /node/{node}/chat: anon/authenticated/content_editor denied; administrator allowed but parameterized. Set all roles to ignore — parameterized, not auditable without seeded node IDs. Added preflight 20260406-dungeoncrawler-release-b.
Public catalog list endpoints (_access: TRUE, GET-only): /backgrounds, /classes, /equipment. No permission required; all roles allow. Added preflight 20260331-dungeoncrawler-release-b.

Public catalog detail routes (_access: TRUE, parameterized slug): /backgrounds/{id}, /classes/{id}, /classes/{id}/starting-equipment. Probe IDs don't match seeded slugs — all return 404 (not an ACL violation). Ignore all roles. Added preflight 20260331-dungeoncrawler-release-b.

GET /character/{character_id}/skills — _access: TRUE, parameterized by character_id (\d+). No permission required; any authenticated or anonymous user may call it. Parameterized entity-ID route; ignore all roles (probe outcome depends on seeded data, no permission violation possible). Added preflight 20260331-dungeoncrawler-release-b.

Character creation ability score API endpoints under /api/characters/ability-scores/. POST routes (calculate, validate-boost) require _csrf_request_header_mode + 'create dungeoncrawler characters'; POST-only GET probes skipped. GET route (available-boosts/{step}) requires 'create dungeoncrawler characters' with step constrained to ancestry|background|class|free — numeric probe returns 404 (not a permission violation). Ignore all roles. Added preflight 20260331-dungeoncrawler-release-b.

GET /testing — _access: TRUE (no permission required). Public testing/staging page; returns 200 for all roles including anonymous. Note: the route comment says 'should be restricted in production environments' — monitor in post-release audit. Added preflight 20260401-dungeoncrawler-release-b.
GET /classes/{id}/starting-equipment — _access: TRUE (public reference data). Added for dc-cr-character-class suite activation.
All /api/combat/* routes — POST-only, CSRF-protected, require 'access dungeoncrawler characters'. Parameterized or POST-only; ignore in probe scans.
GET /api/sprites/resolve — public sprite URL lookup (_access: TRUE or open). Parameterized; ignore in probes.
Dungeoncrawler admin config and content management pages — covered by admin permission. Added preflight 20260405-dungeoncrawler-release-c.
GET /ancestries — public read endpoint listing all ancestry nodes. Anon accessible (TC-AN-04, TC-AN-15).
Character ancestry mutation endpoint — POST-only, auth-required. Anon gets 403/405. Ignore in GET probe scans (POST-only route).
GET /backgrounds — public read endpoint listing background nodes. Anon accessible (TC-BG-13).
Character background mutation endpoint — POST-only, auth-required. Ignore in GET probe scans.
GET /character_class/{id} — public read (anon accessible, TC-CC-03).
Character class application — POST-only, auth-required (TC-CC-04). Ignore in GET probe scans.
Admin node creation for character_class content type (TC-CC-14). Admin/content_editor 200; player/anon 403.
Condition apply/remove endpoint — POST-only, encounter-context (auth-required). Ignore in GET probe scans.
GET /equipment - public reference catalog. Anonymous 200. Added for dc-cr-equipment-system suite activation.
POST /characters/{id}/equipment and DELETE mutations - owner-auth required. GET 405 on these paths (method not allowed). Ignore probe.
POST /api/character/create — initiates character creation draft. Auth required; anonymous gets 302/403. POST-only endpoint: GET probe returns 405 (method not allowed). Ignore all roles.
GET /dungeoncrawler/character/create — character creation form. Auth required; anonymous redirected to login (302) or 403. Covered by TC-HS-12.
GET /roadmap — requirements roadmap page. Public read-only (_access: TRUE in routing). All roles get 200. Status updates are admin-only via POST.
POST /roadmap/requirement/{req_id}/status — JSON API to update requirement status. Admin-only; anonymous and non-admin roles get 403. GET probe returns 405 (method not allowed).

GET /dungeoncrawler/traits — ancestry trait catalog. Requires 'access dungeoncrawler characters'. Anon→403, all authenticated roles→200. Cross-ref: dungeoncrawler-traits-catalog (legacy entry, feature_id: dc-cr-heritage-system). Added preflight 20260407-dungeoncrawler-release-b (dc-cr-ancestry-traits).

GET /api/character/{id}/traits — character traits read. Uses _character_access:TRUE (ownership check). Parameterized: probe ID unlikely to exist in test DB, so 404 is normal (not a permission violation). Ignore all roles. Non-owner access returns 403 (verified in unit tests, not probed via URL audit). Added preflight 20260407-dungeoncrawler-release-b (dc-cr-ancestry-traits).

GET /api/character/{id}/traits/check — hasTraits query endpoint. Uses _character_access:TRUE (ownership check). Parameterized: probe ID unlikely to exist. Ignore all roles. Non-owner returns 403 (verified in unit tests). Added preflight 20260407-dungeoncrawler-release-b (dc-cr-ancestry-traits).

Level-up player routes: POST /level-up, GET /level-up/status, POST /level-up/ability-boosts, POST /level-up/skill-increase, POST /level-up/feat, GET /level-up/feats. All use _character_access:TRUE (ownership check). Parameterized: probe ID unlikely to exist in test DB, so 404 is expected (not a permission violation). Ignore all roles — ownership check not probeable via numeric probe. ACL verified in unit tests (TC-LV-ACL-01). Added preflight 20260407-dungeoncrawler-release-b (dc-cr-character-leveling).

Level-up admin routes: POST /level-up/admin-force, POST /level-up/admin-reset. Gate: 'administer dungeoncrawler content' + _csrf_request_header_mode:TRUE. Parameterized: ignore all roles (probe ID won't exist; POST-only → GET probe returns 405). ACL verified in unit tests (TC-LV-ACL-02): anon→403, player→403, admin→200. Added preflight 20260407-dungeoncrawler-release-b (dc-cr-character-leveling).

GET /dungeoncrawler/senses — sense entity catalog (if Dev creates a public catalog endpoint). Expected: anon=allow, authenticated=allow. Path TBD by Dev; update path_regex at Stage 0 confirmation. Added preflight 20260407-dungeoncrawler-release-b (dc-cr-darkvision). If no public catalog endpoint is created, set all roles to ignore.

Sense entity admin UI route — path TBD by Dev (TC-DV-15). Expected: anon=403, authenticated player=403, administrator=200. THIS RULE IS A PLACEHOLDER — update path_regex when Dev confirms the sense entity admin route path at Stage 0. Do not run audit with this placeholder active. Added preflight 20260407-dungeoncrawler-release-b (dc-cr-darkvision).

Reaction trigger endpoint for Call on Ancient Blood (and future reactions). Uses _character_access:TRUE (ownership check). Parameterized: ignore all roles — probe ID won't exist in test DB. ACL verified in unit tests (TC-HAB-015: non-owner player gets 403, owner and admin succeed). Note: exact route path TBD by Dev — update path_regex when Dev confirms reaction trigger route. Added preflight 20260407-dungeoncrawler-release-b (dc-cr-dwarf-heritage-ancient-blooded).

Reaction use endpoint (path TBD by Dev — pattern inferred from feature scope). Uses _character_access:TRUE + _csrf_request_header_mode:TRUE. Parameterized: probe-ignore. Owner and GM (administrator) allowed; non-owner authenticated player forbidden. ACL verified in unit tests (TC-AB-015). Added preflight 20260407-dungeoncrawler-release-b (dc-cr-dwarf-heritage-ancient-blooded). Update path_regex when Dev confirms exact route in routing.yml.

POST heritage update endpoint. Route /dungeoncrawler/character/{id}/heritage does NOT exist in current routing.yml — this rule is probe-ignore until Dev implements the route. When implemented: _csrf_request_header_mode:TRUE + _character_access:TRUE. Anon→403, authenticated owner→200, authenticated non-owner→403. ACL verified in unit tests (TC-EC-011) and TC-EC-009 once route is live. Added preflight 20260407-dungeoncrawler-release-b (dc-cr-elf-heritage-cavern).

GET senses endpoint. Route /dungeoncrawler/character/{id}/senses does NOT exist in current routing.yml — probe-ignore until Dev implements. When live: _csrf_token:FALSE (GET read-only), _character_access:TRUE, anon→302/403, authenticated owner→200. PM/Dev to decide whether this is a dedicated endpoint or alias of /api/character/{id}/state. If exposed via state endpoint, remove this rule and map TC-LLV-011/012 to state endpoint rule. Added preflight 20260407-dungeoncrawler-release-b (dc-cr-low-light-vision).

GET language catalog endpoint — publicly accessible (anonymous allow). HTTP GET only; no CSRF token required. Added preflight 20260407-dungeoncrawler-release-b (dc-cr-languages). Route does not yet exist; probe-ignore until Dev implements.

POST session-create endpoint. Route does not yet exist — probe-ignore until Dev implements. When live: _csrf_request_header_mode:TRUE, authenticated-only. anon→403, authenticated→200. Campaign_id optional (one-shot allowed). Added 20260407-dungeoncrawler-release-b (dc-cr-session-structure).

POST/PATCH session-end endpoint. Route does not yet exist — probe-ignore until Dev implements. When live: _csrf_request_header_mode:TRUE, _session_access:TRUE (GM or participant). anon→403, authenticated owner/participant→200, authenticated non-participant→403. Added 20260407-dungeoncrawler-release-b (dc-cr-session-structure).

POST campaign-create endpoint. Route does not yet exist — probe-ignore until Dev implements. When live: _csrf_request_header_mode:TRUE, authenticated-only. anon→403, authenticated→200. Added 20260407-dungeoncrawler-release-b (dc-cr-session-structure).

GET campaign-view endpoint. Route does not yet exist — probe-ignore until Dev implements. When live: GET only (no CSRF), _campaign_access:TRUE (campaign member). anon→403, authenticated member→200, authenticated non-member→403. Added 20260407-dungeoncrawler-release-b (dc-cr-session-structure).

POST campaign-invite endpoint. Route does not yet exist — probe-ignore until Dev implements. When live: _csrf_request_header_mode:TRUE, _campaign_gm_access:TRUE. anon→403, authenticated GM→200, authenticated non-GM→403. Invite target must be registered account (validated server-side). Added 20260407-dungeoncrawler-release-b (dc-cr-session-structure).
GET /classes/{id} — _access: TRUE (public class reference data). Covers class detail page without /starting-equipment suffix.
GET /api/character/load/{character_id} — _character_access: TRUE (requires authenticated user owning the character). Probe returns 403 for anon; auth roles allow with test fixtures.
GET /api/dungeon/{id}/state, GET /api/dungeon/{id}/room/{id}/state — _permission: 'access dungeoncrawler characters'. Anon denied; authenticated required.
GET /api/image/{uuid}, /api/images/object/{table}/{id}, /api/sprite/{id} — _permission: 'access dungeoncrawler characters'. Anon denied.
GET /api/campaign/{id}/state — _campaign_access: TRUE + _permission: 'access dungeoncrawler characters'. Anon denied; auth roles allow with test campaign.
GET/POST /api/campaign/{id}/room/{id}/chat|channels|channels/{key} — _campaign_access: TRUE. Anon denied; auth roles allow with test campaign.
GET /api/campaign/{id}/sessions, GET/POST /api/campaign/{id}/sessions/{id}/messages — _campaign_access: TRUE. Anon denied.
GET/POST /api/campaign/{id}/narrative|party-chat|gm-private|system-log — _campaign_access: TRUE. Anon denied.
GET /api/campaign/{id}/entities, POST /api/campaign/{id}/entity/spawn|move|{id} — _permission: 'access dungeoncrawler characters'. Anon denied.
GET /api/campaign/{id}/images — _permission: 'access dungeoncrawler characters'. Anon denied.
GET/POST /api/campaign/{id}/quest-journal, quest-touchpoints, quest-confirmations, quests/* — _permission: 'access dungeoncrawler characters'. Anon denied.
GET/POST /api/game/{id}/action|state|transition|events — _permission: 'access dungeoncrawler characters'. Anon denied.

Acrobatics skill actions (dc-cr-skills-acrobatics-actions) add no new HTTP routes. Skill action resolution flows through existing encounter/exploration phase handlers. ACL regression covered by TC-ACR-29 in dc-cr-skills-acrobatics-actions-phpunit suite. Existing api-game-routes and api-character-routes rules already enforce anon-deny / authenticated-allow.

ACL regression for dc-cr-skills-acrobatics-actions. No new routes introduced by Acrobatics actions. Existing encounter and exploration phase handler routes retain their ACL: anon denied (403), authenticated player allowed (200). Covered by TC-ACR-29 via role-url-audit suite.

ACL regression for dc-cr-skills-arcana-borrow-spell. No new routes introduced by Arcana actions. Existing exploration handler routes retain ACL: anon denied (403), authenticated player allowed (200). TC-ARC-11.

ACL regression for dc-cr-skills-crafting-actions. No new routes introduced by Crafting actions. Existing exploration and downtime handler routes retain ACL: anon denied (403), authenticated player allowed (200). TC-CRF-30.

ACL regression for dc-cr-skills-deception-actions. No new routes introduced by Deception actions. Existing encounter and exploration handler routes retain ACL: anon denied (403), authenticated player allowed (200). TC-DEC-26.

ACL regression for dc-cr-skills-diplomacy-actions. No new routes introduced by Diplomacy or Intimidation actions. Existing encounter handler routes (request, demoralize) and downtime handler routes (gather_information, make_impression, coerce) retain ACL: anon denied (403), authenticated player allowed (200). TC-DIP-29.

ACL regression for dc-cr-skills-lore-earn-income. No new routes introduced by Lore or Earn Income actions. Existing downtime handler routes retain ACL: anon denied (403), authenticated player allowed (200). TC-LRE-16.
ACL regression for dc-cr-skills-nature-command-animal. No new routes introduced. Nature Recall Knowledge and Command an Animal route through existing encounter handler. TC-NAT-14.
ACL regression for dc-cr-skills-performance-perform. No new routes introduced. Perform routes through existing encounter handler; Earn Income through downtime handler. TC-PER-14.
ACL for NPC CRUD endpoints. NPC data scoped to owning campaign; anonymous and cross-campaign access denied. TC-NPCS-11.
ACL for AI GM context endpoint that receives NPC data. Authenticated campaign participants only. TC-NPCS-07, TC-NPCS-08.
ACL for AI GM narration endpoint. Authenticated campaign participants only. Anon denied. TC-GNE-03, TC-GNE-04.
ACL for session summary generation and retrieval. Campaign owner (GM) write; campaign participants read. Anon denied. TC-GNE-09.
ACL for character feat selection endpoint. Auth required; scoped to character owner. Cross-user modification must be rejected. TC-MCA-10.
Downtime activity endpoints (earn income, retraining, crafting, subsist, treat disease, business). Auth required; scoped to character owner. Anon denied. TC-DTM-09, TC-DTM-10.
Downtime audit log read. Auth required; campaign GM and character owner only. Anon denied. TC-DTM-09.
Regression guard: feat system adds no new routes; existing character creation form must retain ACL
Regression guard: feat system adds no new routes; existing leveling form must retain ACL
